label: Iran Killed
source: Al Jazeera / HRANA / Hengaw / Iran Health Ministry
contestNote: Iran Health Ministry (official floor): 1,444+ killed, 18,551+ injured. HRANA estimates exceed 2,800+ including 181+ children. Hengaw: 4,300+ total in first 10 days. Iran UN ambassador: ~10,000 civilian sites hit. Pentagon denies targeting civilian infrastructure. 3.2M Iranians displaced per UNHCR. Internet blackout (~1% connectivity / 290+ hrs) severely limits verification.

label: US Killed
deltaNote: 13 KIA confirmed: 6 Army Reserve killed in Kuwait drone strike (Feb 28), Sgt. Benjamin N. Pennington (died Mar 8 from wounds), 6 KC-135 crew (status: crash investigation ongoing). ~140 wounded total.

label: Israel Killed
deltaNote: 15 killed in Israel total. 58 hospitalized in Iran's most intense missile barrage (Mar 13) targeting Palmachim Airbase, Ovda Airbase, Shin Bet HQ. 2,000+ Israelis wounded total.

label: Gulf Region Killed
deltaNote: 6 vessels struck in Persian Gulf in 48 hours (March 11-12). UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, Oman all struck. Oman fuel depot fire. Bahrain fuel tanks targeted March 12.

label: Lebanon Killed
source: Lebanese health authorities / Lebanon Information Ministry
deltaNote: 773 killed including 98 children and 47 women. 800,000+ displaced. Hezbollah continues rocket barrages at northern Israel. Lebanese PM Nawaf Salam: Lebanon 'did not want' this war. Israeli DM Katz warns Israel will 'take the territory' if Lebanon can't control Hezbollah.

label: Brent Crude
deltaNote: Spiked past $100/bbl overnight Mar 12-13 after Mojtaba Khamenei vowed Hormuz stays closed. IEA releases record 400M barrels (US: 172M from SPR). Iran warns '$200/bbl.' Despite reserve release, prices remain above $100. Largest supply disruption in IEA history.

label: Flights Cancelled
deltaNote: ~500 oil tankers stranded in Persian Gulf. Hormuz traffic near-zero. IEA: largest supply disruption in history of global oil market.

label: Countries Affected
deltaNote: Iran, Israel, Lebanon, UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Iraq, Jordan, Azerbaijan, Turkey, Cyprus, France. Day 15: US strikes Kharg Island (Iran's main oil terminal). Pentagon vows to 'ramp up'. IDF struck Shiraz missile production, Ahvaz IRGC Ground Forces HQ. 16+ vessels struck in Gulf total.
